Component.Name: CutOffQtyDesc2Static
Component.HelpFileName: =Trim(IIf( IsNothing(Fields!cut_off_qty.Value), Format(Round(0, Fields!qty_unit_places.Value), Fields!qty_unit_format.Value), Format(Round(Fields!cut_off_qty.Value, Fields!qty_unit_places.Value), Fields!qty_unit_format.Value) ))

VALUE: 0; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Whse; RPTNP: True) REGION18(ID: UNKNOWN18; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = L; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Whse; RPTNP: True; VISINDESIGN: False) REGION19(ID: UNKNOWN19; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = L; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Whse; RPTNP: True; VISINDESIGN: False) REGION20(ID: UNKNOWN20; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = I; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Whse; RPTNP: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION21(ID: UNKNOWN21; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = I; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Whse; RPTNP: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION22(ID: UNKNOWN22; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PageBetween) = 1; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: GroupValue; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION23(ID: UNKNOWN33; VALUE: 0; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = L & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) <> 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION24(ID: UNKNOWN34; VALUE: 2.5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = L & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) <> 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: False) REGION25(ID: UNKNOWN37; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = L & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) = 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: False) REGION26(ID: UNKNOWN36; VALUE: 0; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = L & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) = 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION27(ID: UNKNOWN35; VALUE: 0; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = L & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) = 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION28(ID: UNKNOWN23; VALUE: 0; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = L & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) = 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION29(ID: SortItem; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = I & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) <> 1; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: Loc; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION30(ID: UNKNOWN30_SITE; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; KEPPRV: True) REGION31(ID: UNKNOWN24; VALUE: 0; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = I & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) <> 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION32(ID: UNKNOWN41; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = I & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) = 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: False) REGION33(ID: UNKNOWN40; VALUE: 0; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(SortBy) = I & #V(PrintBarcodeFormat) = 1; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintPieces) = 1 & #P(Attr1Value) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION37(ID: UNKNOWN28; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintPieces) = 1 & #P(Attr1Value) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION38(ID: UNKNOWN29; VALUE: 0.01; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PageBetween) = 1; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: GroupValue; BRKAFT: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION39(ID: UNKNOWN30; VALUE: 1.5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: 0=1; SECTYPE: DetailFooter; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: PageFooter) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: NavigationFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Horizontal; ALIGN: Middle; PACK: Center; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: PageFooterFlexLayout

Component.Name: PageHeaderFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(HorizontalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 5fl; ORIEN: Vertical; ALIGN: Left; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 1fl; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 12; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable) INDEX(1) TARGET(UNKNOWN1)

Component.Name: PrintBarcodeFormatStatic
Component.HelpFileName: =Switch( Parameters!PrintBarcodeFormat.Value = 1, Parameters!sYes.Value, Parameters!PrintBarcodeFormat.Value = 0, Parameters!sNo.Value, True, Parameters!sNo.Value )

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(CycleType), VAR V(ABCCode), VAR V(SortBy), VAR V(PageBetween), VAR V(PrintCutoffQty), VAR V(StartingItem), VAR V(EndingItem), VAR V(StartingLocation), VAR V(EndingLocation), VAR V(StartingProductCode), VAR V(EndingProductCode), VAR V(StartingPlannerCode), VAR V(EndingPlannerCode), VAR V(PrintBarcodeFormat), VAR V(DisplayHeader), VAR V(Whse), VAR V(PrintPieces), VAR, VAR V(Parm_Site))

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: For i As Integer = ThisForm.Components.Count To 0 Step -1
For i As Integer = ThisForm.Components.Count To 0 Step -1
If Not HasFound1stLocOrItemComp AndAlso ThisForm.Components.ContainsKey(CurLocOrItemComp & "Static_" & CStr(i)) Then
If Not HasFound1stGroupValueComp AndAlso ThisForm.Components.ContainsKey(CurLocOrItemComp & "GrpValStatic_" & CStr(i)) Then
If Not HasFound1stLocOrItemDescComp AndAlso ThisForm.Components.ContainsKey(CurLocOrItemComp & "DescStatic_" & CStr(i)) Then
If Not HasFound1stGroupValueDescComp AndAlso ThisForm.Components.ContainsKey(CurLocOrItemComp & "GrpValDescStatic_" & CStr(i)) Then
If HasFound1stLocOrItemComp AndAlso HasFound1stGroupValueComp AndAlso HasFound1stGroupValueDescComp AndAlso HasFound1stLocOrItemDescComp Then
